# robots.txt para RoaBusiness
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin-login
Disallow: /registrar-negocio
Disallow: /editar-negocio

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://roabusiness.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay
Crawl-delay: 1

# Specific bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /
